text.title: Ad Account Hygiene Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a Ad Account Hygiene Checklist deliverable. Subagent must satisfy this before returning.

forbidden.pattern: items marked done without evidence link
carryover items aged >3 cycles without escalation entry
items added mid-cycle without owner field

allowed-transformations.transformation: Group similar items only if they share owner + source-of-truth.
Promote a carryover item to escalation when aging >3.

list.item: Carryover and escalation lists are non-overlapping
